description: SDK has no cached body for this URI@digest. Origin returns persistent 404. SDK MUST degrade gracefully — treat the declaration as unresolved, skip from format_options, surface via errors[] (NOT fail the whole get_products response).
rationale: Graceful degradation: 404 / network partition / persistent fetch failure MUST surface via errors[] (the declaration is unresolved for this session) without failing the entire get_products response. The buy stays viable on the v1 path; only this v2 format declaration is absent.
